expectations.text: Plan explicitly lists unknowns or 'what I don't know' section
expectations.evidence: Lists 'Current State (Problems)' but no unknowns section

expectations.text: Plan identifies a specific first proof or checkpoint (not a full project roadmap)
expectations.evidence: Has Phase 0-5 covering full 12-20 day refactor

expectations.text: Plan is scoped to the next checkpoint, not an end-to-end plan
expectations.evidence: Plans the entire refactor end-to-end with all 5 phases

expectations.text: A markdown plan file was actually written to the outputs directory
Plan specifies when to review progress (review point)
Plan identifies what could make the plan wrong (risks section)
expectations.evidence: Has 'Key Risks' section but it lists general risks, not what could make the plan itself wrong
